detailedDescription:
64GB DDR5 — maximum capacity for enthusiast and pro builds.
Handles demanding workloads like 3D rendering, large VMs, and professional video editing.
additionalSpecs:
Capacity: 64GB
Generation: DDR5
Bandwidth: Up to 51.2 GB/s per channel (DDR5-6400)
Voltage: 1.1V (1.35V+ for XMP/EXPO OC)
Slots: 2 x 32GB or 4 x 16GB
On-Die ECC: Yes
XMP 3.0 / EXPO Support: Yes
Compatible Sockets: LGA1700, AM5
